creator: nekoprog@gmail.com
text:
Hello, I would like to request a new port for ESPRESSObin Marvell Armada 3720.

Attached here are links to some files that might be able to help in creating this port.

Marvell Armada 3700 specs:
https://www.marvell.com/embedded-processors/armada/armada-3700/

ESPRESSObin Armada3720 defconfig:
https://github.com/u-boot/u-boot/blob/master/configs/mvebu_espressobin-88f3720_defconfig

ESPRESSObin Armada 3720 dts:
https://github.com/u-boot/u-boot/blob/master/arch/arm/dts/armada-3720-espressobin.dts

What's left is a slave port for u-boot and dtb.
